description: The Maceo Organization was a criminal syndicate that controlled Galveston, Texas, from the 1920s to the 1980s. Founded by brothers Sam and Rosario Maceo, it engaged in illegal gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, and racketeering. The organization wielded significant political influence, with ties to Texas Governor James V. Allred and other officials. It was eventually succeeded by the Fertitta Organization.
